title: Modern Industrialization Extra
description: Modern Industrialization with extra industrial themed mods to make progression faster and easier
body:
# This modpack is focused on Modern Industrialization

The aim of this modpack is total industrialization of every mineral that exists in the game. I try to not make it too difficult... hopefully.

Extra industrial themed mods are added to make automation and progression easier, such as Better Furnaces, Applied Energestics 2, Simple Copper Pipes.

Some QoL mods are also added, along with performance optimization mods, but bugs are expected, here be dragons!

This modpack was originally built for WARNET discord server, but you are free to use it for your own community!

### Credits
Credits to each mod, resource pack, and shader creators in which this modpack depends to. Without them, this modpack would be impossible to create.
